title: Server watcher — chokidar file watching with in-memory cache
completion_summary: Created server/cache.js and server/watcher.js with chokidar-based event-driven file watching, no polling. Cache warmed on startup.
acceptance_criteria: chokidar watches html/year10 for add, change, unlink events
In-memory cache invalidated/updated on file events
File changes reflected in /api/presentations without server restart
